---
title: "Text Data"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

# Text Data

This is the polished Rmd file generated for your session.

Replace this placeholder with the full content previously provided in chat.
